subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Blessed Beauty! Concerning the questions thou didst ask, I have absolutely no time to reply each day [3.5s]... ...The station which he who hath truly recognized this Revelation will attain is the same as the one
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی مسائلی که سوال نموده بودی ابدا فرصت جواب نه در هر روز
subcodes.subjects: @essential distinction of Manifestation of God from others, @station of the Manifestation of God
